hallucination.rationale: The note mentions 'hearing loss' as a denied symptom, which was not discussed in the transcript. Otherwise, content is generally consistent with the transcript.

instruction_following.rationale: The output is not a clinical note at all — it is a stream-of-consciousness internal monologue repeated dozens of times in <think> tags. It completely ignores the instruction to produce a structured clinical note following the template.

completeness.rationale: No structured clinical note was produced. While some transcript content appears scattered in the thinking blocks, there is no actual note output capturing the required clinical information in any usable form.
missed_items: HPI details (onset, duration, quality, location, timing)
Plan (labs, lifestyle modifications, follow-up, acetaminophen recommendation, ibuprofen avoidance)

template_adherence.rationale: No template structure was followed whatsoever. The output consists entirely of repeated <think> blocks with no Subjective, Objective, Assessment, or Plan sections.

entity_marking.rationale: No entity marking was attempted anywhere in the output.

duplication.rationale: The same <think> block content is repeated over 30 times verbatim.
